items.title: Paul McCartney Played Beatles Classic for First Time Since 1964 at Taylor Swift’s Wedding
items.summary: Sixty-two years after the Beatles last performed "I Want to Hold Your Hand," McCartney played the song for the first time as a solo artist at Madison Square Garden reception

items.title: 'Stop use immediately’ warning to Irish parents as multiple children's toys recalled
items.summary: The Competition and Consumer Protection Commission has given notice of a number of children's products which have been recalled in Ireland due to health or injury risk

items.title: Fiona Apple Soundtracks Title Sequence For New Anya Taylor-Joy Miniseries Lucky
items.summary: Fiona Apple is coming back into the fold. Her music is being used to soundtrack the new miniseries Lucky, starring Anya Taylor-Joy and based on the 2021 novel by Marissa Stapley. It premieres on Apple TV+ on July 15.

items.title: Paul McCartney Played “I Want To Hold Your Hand” For The First Time Since 1964 At Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce’s Wedding
items.summary: Taylor Swift once penned "It's a love story, baby just say 'Yes.'" And now, her art has become reality. The massive pop star got married on July 3 to NFL player Travis Kelce at Madison Square Garden. Unsurprisingly, it seems like every celebrity and their grandmother and their dog was there.
